creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Nathan from comment #2)
I see no guidelines suggesting extra blank lines after USES.  The sample Makefile in the PHB (Ch 14) doesn't indicate that.  Avoiding the extra line seems like a good balance since it would not really improve readability or consistency - and as a bonus, avoids excessive proliferation of vertical spacing.

I fixed the GH_ACCOUNT ordering per reasonable documented grouping guidelines.
And also fixed the stray PORTREVISION.

Thanks.
